'''Cilpar''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], nearly covered in [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]], jungles, and [[Tree/Legends|forests]]. It was characterized by the near-indestructible ancient [[temple]]s scattered across the surface. Local flora and fauna included the predatory [[Ronk/Legends|ronk]].

==History==
At some point after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] landed on the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Stenax]] [[Species/Legends|species]], [[Stenos/Legends|Stenos]], several members of the species travelled off-[[Planet/Legends|world]] as part of a plan. They placed operatives on multiple worlds, including Cilpar, to study the species of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and evaluate those suitable for conquest.<ref name="University of Sanbra">{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}}</ref>

Cilpar was liberated from the Galactic Empire by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was held by the Empire when Rogue Squadron set up a base in the mountains west of the capital, [[Kiidan]], after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. A simple mission turned deadly when they ran into a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] ambush. After a long battle, [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Boren Tascl]] and [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Norquest]] were [[Mission to Cilpar|overthrown]].

It later became a hiring ground for [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] tried to hire the [[Soskin Guard]] there.

{{Planet-stub}}
